vivid/text/heading/font-family.$description: The font family used for all heading text.

vivid/text/heading/font-stretch.$description: The font stretch applied to all heading text.

vivid/text/heading/font-weight/normal.$description: The default font weight for heading text.

vivid/text/heading/font-weight/bold.$description: The bold font weight for heading text.

vivid/text/heading/xs/font-size.$description: Font size for the xs heading.

vivid/text/heading/xs/line-height.$description: Line height for the xs heading.

vivid/text/heading/sm/font-size.$description: Font size for the sm heading.

vivid/text/heading/sm/line-height.$description: Line height for the sm heading.

vivid/text/heading/md/font-size.$description: Font size for the md heading.

vivid/text/heading/md/line-height.$description: Line height for the md heading.

vivid/text/heading/lg/font-size.$description: Font size for the lg heading.

vivid/text/heading/lg/line-height.$description: Line height for the lg heading.

vivid/text/heading/xl/font-size.$description: Font size for the xl heading.

vivid/text/heading/xl/line-height.$description: Line height for the xl heading.

vivid/text/heading/2xs.$description: The smallest heading size, for small print titles and lowest-emphasis headings.

vivid/text/heading/xs.$description: An extra-small heading for minor section titles and component group labels.

vivid/text/heading/sm.$description: A small heading for subsection titles and supporting content.

vivid/text/heading/md.$description: A medium heading for section titles and prominent content areas.

vivid/text/heading/lg.$description: A large heading for primary section headings.

vivid/text/heading/xl.$description: The largest heading, intended for use as page titles. Use sparingly.
